The vendor tree should stay as close to upstream as possible. Whale-specific
runtime behavior belongs in bridge or overlay code. If a direct vendor edit is
unavoidable, record it under `patches/codex-cli/` and mention it in the
corresponding sync log under `docs/migration/codex-sync/`.
